---
title: '{{title}}'
output: 
  learnr::tutorial:
    progressive: true
    allow_skip: true
    css: css/learnr-theme.css
runtime: shiny_prerendered
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
## --- Options ---
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE)

## --- learnr ---
if ("learnr" %in% (.packages()))
  detach(package:learnr, unload = TRUE)
library(learnr)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
## --- Options ---
eval_ex <- TRUE
echo_ex <- FALSE
eval_sol <- TRUE
echo_sol <- FALSE
eval_learnr <- TRUE
eval_learnr_sol <- TRUE
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, context="server"}
## --- Options ---
eval_ex <- TRUE
echo_ex <- FALSE
eval_sol <- TRUE
echo_sol <- FALSE
eval_learnr <- TRUE
eval_learnr_sol <- TRUE
```

<<"{{content}}">>
